query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up photograph of a person with curly golden-brown hair, wearing a white textured garment, possibly fur or a fluffy coat. The person's face is turned slightly to the side, and warm light falls across the visible features. The image has a soft, diffused quality throughout.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up photograph of a person with curly golden-brown hair, wearing a white textured garment, possibly fur or a fluffy coat, where heavy intentional blur and motion softening dissolve facial features and surrounding textures into indistinct, dreamlike vagueness. The person's turned face and warm light are obscured by pervasive smearing that eliminates fine detail across hair, skin, and fabric, rendering the entire frame in hazy, unfocused abstraction.
